licensed_by.definition: the father of one's father or mother
licensed_by.reading: one's father-or-mother = one's parent (parent def), so: the father of x's parent is x's grandfather
licensed_by.span: the FATHER of one's FATHER OR MOTHER

licensed_by.reading: a father is a parent (father def), and a parent of one's father-or-mother is a grandparent (grandparent def) => every grandfather is a grandparent
